docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY WINN, SAGE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCESS: PLAINTIFF SAGE WINN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF OTHER (SPECIFY): SC-107 SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA AND DECLARATION SERVICE FEE: $125.00 SERVED OCT-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 12, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION TO SAGE WINN. INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
